subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the omnipotent King, Who, through the effulgent rays of the Sun of Truth, hath illumined the realm of wisdom and utterance [3.5s]... ...Death is naught but ascension from one realm to another, more excellent than the first, and merely a transition from one place to another
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد سلطان مقتدری را لایق و سزاست که بانوار آفتاب حقیقت عالم حکمت و بیان را
subcodes.subjects: @names and attributes of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort
